home.hero_subtitle: Gqom, iGqom, nomculo waseKomani — ufikelele kuwe naphi na.
home.about_bio: DJ Ntsira nguLituko Siphe, ingcali yeGqom evela eKomani, eMpuma Koloni. Umculo wakhe uthetha umntu wonke.
home.music_preview_sub: Phulaphula kwaye uthenge ngqo — akukho ikhadi.
home.no_tracks_message: Umculo omtsha uza kungekudala. Jonga kwakhona!
home.booking_cta_body: Bhuka DJ Ntsira kwisiganeko sakho — imini okanye ebusuku, naphi na eMpuma Koloni.

booking.title: Bhuka u-DJ Ntsira
booking.hospitality_ack: Ndiyavuma ukubonelela ngesistim yesandi, izibane, i-DJ booth kunye namanzi.
booking.deposit_notice: Idiphozithi engenamhlombo ka-50% iyafuneka ukuqinisekisa ukubhuka.
booking.transport_notice: Intlawulo yothutho iya kubangelwa ukuba indawo ikude nge-20km+
